title: bus.agent.heartbeat v1
description: Periodic liveness signal from a running agent session. Emitted by Codex CLI agents on a fixed interval (typically 30s). Distinct from bus.agent.activity.v1 which carries tool-level events. Producers should migrate to this schema; bus.agent.activity heartbeat enum is a backward-compat alias.

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of the heartbeat.

cwd.description: Working directory at time of heartbeat.

interval_s.description: Nominal heartbeat interval in seconds. Used to detect missed beats.

memory_mb.description: Agent process RSS in MB at time of heartbeat.

cpu_pct.description: Agent process CPU% at time of heartbeat (0-100).
